sentiment: Every day, a small breath inward — then back out again, carrying something you didn't have before.

stories.title: Three Inverse Laws of AI
stories.summary: The inverses of Asimov's laws illuminate the strange new geometry of machine intelligence — and who bears the weight when the rules go wrong.

stories.title: Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters
stories.summary: Speed is the secret ingredient no one wants to admit they need — faster inference reshapes what becomes possible in the space of a breath.

stories.title: Write some software, give it away for free
stories.summary: The gift economy of software — the more you give, the more you discover what you actually built.
